'''zhodhadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:reaaal|reaaal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-dh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reaaal|reaaal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhodhadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhodhadhithi|zhodhadhithi]] || [[word:zhodhadhiji|zhodhadhiji]] || [[word:zhodhadhishi|zhodhadhishi]] || [[word:zhodhadhiki|zhodhadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhodhadhuthuthu|zhodhadhuthuthu]] || [[word:zhodhadhujuju|zhodhadhujuju]] || [[word:zhodhadhushushu|zhodhadhushushu]] || [[word:zhodhadhukuku|zhodhadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhodhadhuthu|zhodhadhuthu]] || [[word:zhodhadhuju|zhodhadhuju]] || [[word:zhodhadhushu|zhodhadhushu]] || [[word:zhodhadhuku|zhodhadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhodhadhufthuf|zhodhadhufthuf]] || [[word:zhodhadhufjuf|zhodhadhufjuf]] || [[word:zhodhadhufshuf|zhodhadhufshuf]] || [[word:zhodhadhufkuf|zhodhadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhodhadhethe|zhodhadhethe]] || [[word:zhodhadheje|zhodhadheje]] || [[word:zhodhadheshe|zhodhadheshe]] || [[word:zhodhadheke|zhodhadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhodhadhothotho|zhodhadhothotho]] || [[word:zhodhadhojojo|zhodhadhojojo]] || [[word:zhodhadhoshosho|zhodhadhoshosho]] || [[word:zhodhadhokoko|zhodhadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhodhadhotho|zhodhadhotho]] || [[word:zhodhadhojo|zhodhadhojo]] || [[word:zhodhadhosho|zhodhadhosho]] || [[word:zhodhadhoko|zhodhadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhodhadhofthof|zhodhadhofthof]] || [[word:zhodhadhofjof|zhodhadhofjof]] || [[word:zhodhadhofshof|zhodhadhofshof]] || [[word:zhodhadhofkof|zhodhadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf|zhodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf|zhodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf|zhodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf|zhodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhodhadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhodhadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhodhadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhodhadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhodhadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf|zhodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf|zhodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf|zhodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf|zhodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf|zhodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf|zhodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf|zhodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf|zhodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhodhadhĂŠthĂŠ|zhodhadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhodhadhĂŠjĂŠ|zhodhadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhodhadhĂŠshĂŠ|zhodhadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhodhadhĂŠkĂŠ|zhodhadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhodhadhathatha|zhodhadhathatha]] || [[word:zhodhadhajaja|zhodhadhajaja]] || [[word:zhodhadhashasha|zhodhadhashasha]] || [[word:zhodhadhakaka|zhodhadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhodhadhatha|zhodhadhatha]] || [[word:zhodhadhaja|zhodhadhaja]] || [[word:zhodhadhasha|zhodhadhasha]] || [[word:zhodhadhaka|zhodhadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhodhadhafthaf|zhodhadhafthaf]] || [[word:zhodhadhafjaf|zhodhadhafjaf]] || [[word:zhodhadhafshaf|zhodhadhafshaf]] || [[word:zhodhadhafkaf|zhodhadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhodhadhasha|zhodhadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhodhadhshĂ«sha|zhodhadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhodhadhrosha|zhodhadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhodhadhmusha|zhodhadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhodhadhyasha|zhodhadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhodhadhnkshĂ«sha|gozhodhadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhodhadhnkrosha|gozhodhadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhodhadhnkmusha|gozhodhadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhodhadhnkyasha|gozhodhadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhodhadhadhasha|zhodhadhadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhodhadhadhshĂ«sha|zhodhadhadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhodhadhadhrosha|zhodhadhadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhodhadhadhmusha|zhodhadhadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhodhadhadhyasha|zhodhadhadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhodhadhadhnkshĂ«sha|gozhodhadhadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhodhadhadhnkrosha|gozhodhadhadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhodhadhadhnkmusha|gozhodhadhadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhodhadhadhnkyasha|gozhodhadhadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhedhĂŠdhasha|zhedhĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhedhĂŠdhshĂ«sha|zhedhĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhedhĂŠdhrosha|zhedhĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhedhĂŠdhmusha|zhedhĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhedhĂŠdhyasha|zhedhĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhedhĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gozhedhĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhedhĂŠdhnkrosha|gozhedhĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhedhĂŠdhnkmusha|gozhedhĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhedhĂŠdhnkyasha|gozhedhĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhodhfadhasha|zhodhfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhodhfadhshĂ«sha|zhodhfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhodhfadhrosha|zhodhfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhodhfadhmusha|zhodhfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhodhfadhyasha|zhodhfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhodhfadhnkshĂ«sha|gozhodhfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhodhfadhnkrosha|gozhodhfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhodhfadhnkmusha|gozhodhfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhodhfadhnkyasha|gozhodhfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
